Where do movers come from?

Share of households moving into housing whose home a year earlier was outside the destination — by housing age, 2019 vs 2024. Pick a metro below or click the map.

 Metros shaded gray have too few surveyed households to map (n<25).

Known data issues & caveats

The first three below are flagged on the specific metros they affect (look for the amber notices under the table). The rest apply everywhere.

Filter & explore metros

Tick options to narrow the map. Within a group, choices are combined with OR; across groups they’re combined with AND (e.g. “Over 1M” + “≥50% from another metro” = big metros that are also outsider-heavy). The map dims metros that don’t match. Your selection stays active after you close this window — the map keeps the filter until you press “Clear”. Year-based filters follow the Year selector at left.

Closing keeps your filter — the map stays narrowed until you clear it.
